meaning: adj.河流的,生长在河中的,河流冲刷作用形成的
examples: As a result of fluvial scouring and aggrading the riverbed, the alluvial layer is fluid-saturated porous medium.
Understand the distribution of worldwide fluvial hydrocarbon production.
The research of fluvial incision in the future will explore more scientific problems concerning both fluvial dynamics and geodynamics.
This is the first view scientists have had of a fluvial system - one relating to a river or stream -- from the surface of Mars.
Fluvial processes are also critical to the pillars.
